Menace

When Doppelganger enters, look at the top ten cards of your library. You may reveal a Wizard creature or Sumireko planeswalker card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Doppelganger becomes a copy of the revealed card, except it's 3/3 if it's a creature. Put three loyalty counters on it if it's a planeswalker.

Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
Then if you control three or more basic lands, create two Food tokens. [i](They're artifacts with “{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.”)[/i]
